1. Automated testing should not assume standard ports, since they need to be deterministic. The midi server should be configured such that the OS offers it a guaranteed free port to listen to--and that port configuration is propagated everywhere it needs to go; 2. why do you think there will be a 500 ms latency hit using the midi server?

b_agent_drafts.text: I've been reading about best practices regarding delegation to sub-agents and it seems like the preferred way to delegate is to have the sub-agents do the research and propose what actions to take, then the main claude agent (you) executes those actions. Do I understand that correctly?
